title: The One With The Nap Partners

lines.text: A Restaurant, Phoebe, Rachel, and Monica are having brunch.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, the reason why I asked you guys out to brunch today is because I have been doing some thinking about who should be my maid of honor.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God! This is it! (She and Phoebe hold hands.) (To Phoebe) I really hope it's you!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I hope it's you.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Me too!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: First of all um, I love you both so much and you're both so important to me...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, bla-bla-bla-bla!! Who is it?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well umm, I was thinking that maybe we could come up with a system where we trade of being maid of honor for each other. Like hypothetically, if Phoebe were mine...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yes!!! Oh!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hypothetically!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Still.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: If Phoebe were my maid of honor...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh-hmm.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Rachel would be Phoebe's, I would be Rachel's, that way we all get to do it once and no one would get upset.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah that's actually a pretty good idea.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, I'll do that. So who gets to be yours?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (laughs) Well that's the best part. Umm, you guys get to decide!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Wh-why is that the best part?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Because then I don't have to!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well of course we will help you decide! We will do anything we can to help you! Now, I would like to make a toast, to the future Mrs. Chandler Bing (A woman at the table behind them overhears Chandler's name and starts listening closer), my best friend, and truly one of the nicest people that...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'm really not deciding!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Fine!
The woman gets up and walks over to their table.

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.text: Excuse me, I-I couldn't help overhearing, you're marrying Chandler Bing?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah that's right.

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.text: (sarcastically) Huh, good luck!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Aww, and good luck to you too! (To Monica and Rachel) What a nice lady!
Opening Credits
Ross's apartment, Chandler, Joey, and Ross are finishing watching Die Hard on video.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Die Hard still great!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yep. Hey, what do you say we make it a double feature?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What'd you rent?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Die Hard 2.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (looking at the tape) Joey, this is Die Hard 1 again.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, well we watch it a second time and its Die Hard 2!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Joey, we just saw it!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: And?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And it'll be cool to see it again! Yeah!

lines.speaker: Joey and Ross
lines.text: Die Hard!!!!!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Dude, you didn't say Die Hard. Is everything okay?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, I just got uh, got plans.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, John McLane had plans!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, see the thing is I want to get out of here before Joey gets all worked up and starts calling everybody bitch.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What are you talking about? Bitch.
Central Perk, Phoebe is bringing Rachel some coffee.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey Rachel?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Umm, when I get married will you be my maid of honor?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Really?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh-hmm.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God Phoebe! I mean I'm just-Wait a minute. If I'm your maid of honor that means you are Monica's.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh! Well, if that's what you want...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh! No way Phoebe! I want to be Monica's!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: But why does it even matter?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Why does it matter so much to you?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Because this one is now! And-and it's two of our best friends! Who knows what you're gonna marry!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What-what if I marry Ross-Or Joey?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (gasps) You wouldn't! Okay look, Rachel I know you really want to do this, but I-I've never been maid of honor to anyone before! And I know you've done it at least twice!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah but Phoebe...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: And no, oh please, oh please let me finish. (Rachel stops talking.) Oh I guess that was it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. Okay. It's-since you've never done it before you can be Monica's made of honor.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, thank you so much! (They hug.) Okay.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm gonna marry someone good y'know.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh I know.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Better than Chandler. (Phoebe exhales as if to say, "Like what isn't?")

Ross's apartment, Die Hard has ended, only I don't think Joey and Ross know that yet. As you see, they are both asleep. And they're on the same couch. Which means they're sleeping together. Not like Joey is at one end and Ross is on the other, they both happen to be lying down and sleeping together. Well, there hasn't been any clothes removed so not that kind of sleeping together. Not that there's anything wrong with that. That is unless you're a Republican in which that kind of thing will bring about the downfall of Western society, especially if they should happen to want to get married. Anyway, let me recap. No, there is too much, let me sum up. Ross and Joey are taking a nap together on top of each other and both wake-up at the same time, realize what they just did, scream, and jump up.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What happened?!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, I don't know!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: We fell asleep! That is all.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah. Yep. Yeah. All right, well uh, I'd better go.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I think that would be best.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah. All right, I'll talk to you later.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay. But not about this!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No! Never! Never! (Pause, then Joey wants to shake Ross's hand.) Bye.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No touch! No touch!
Monica, Chandler, and Phoebe's, Monica has just gotten back from brunch and is telling Chandler about it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah hey, a weird thing happened today whey I was at brunch. This woman overheard that I was marrying you and-and then she...she wished me good luck.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That's sweet.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, it's more like a (sarcastically) good luck.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So uh, what did this woman look like?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: She was like 30, dark hair, attractive.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, is there any chance you were looking into a bright, shiny thing called a mirror?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Come on, was it somebody maybe you dated in college?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, no I only dated two girls in college, both blonde, both not attractive... (Thinks a little while.) Hold on one second; let me check this out. (He gets up and grabs a photo album.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, let's see... (Finding the picture he wants.) Okay uh, is that her? (Pointing to the picture.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God yes! Who is she?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Julie Grath, my camp girlfriend.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Did you break up with her?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (pause) No, we're still together. Yeah we went out for two summers, and then I broke up with her.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, 'cause she came back the third summer and she'd gotten really fa-aa-aw-ow...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Fat?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I did not say fat! I said, "Fa-aa-aw-ow..."

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You broke up with a girl because she was fat?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah. Yeah, but it was a really, really long time ago! Does she still feel bad?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, apparently she does.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, you know what they say, elephants never forget. (Monica is not amused by that statement.) Seriously, good luck marrying me.
Joey and Rachel's, Joey is entering, Rachel and Phoebe are already there.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! What's going on?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Phoebe is gonna be Monica's maid of honor!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! Well I hope it goes better than the last time you did it for that girl downstairs, remember? (Phoebe glares at him.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (shocked) You have been maid of honor before?!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: See? This is exactly why you shouldn't lie!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right that's it! I am maid of honor!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Na-uh, I am!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: How come you are?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Because I cared enough to lie!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey-hey-hey-hey, I can help you decide who should do it! Yeah, we could have like uh, like an audition and see how you'd handle maid of honor type situations.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What are you talking about?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Like when I want a job, I go to an audition and if I'm the best of the people they see, they give me the part.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, so after this audition, who decides who gets it?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh uh, me and Ross can be the judges.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (To Rachel) Well, it's better than us deciding.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, come on! This is crazy! Can't we just flip a coin?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No! Coins hate me!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. Okay fine, y'know what? We will let Ross and Joey decide. (Ross enters.) (In a sexy voice.) Hiiiii, Ross! Sweetie.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey there, you handsome thing. (Rachel and Phoebe exit.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wow, this cologne really is every bit as good as Georgio.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Just uh, brought back your videos.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh hey look uh Ross, look I think we need to talk about before.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No! No we don't!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yes we do! Now look, that was the best nap I ever had!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I... I don't know what you are talking about.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Come on! Admit it! That was the best nap you ever had!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I've had better.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay! When?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: All right! All right! It was the best nap ever!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh-huh!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I've said it! Okay?! But it's over Joey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I want to do it again.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: We can't do it again.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Because it's weird!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Fine! Do you want something to drink?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Sure, what do you got?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Warm milk and Excedrin P.M. (Ross just leaves.)
Commercial Break
Monica, Chandler, and Phoebe's, Monica is approaching the bathroom door behind which Chandler is using the facility.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler! (Knocks on the door.) Chandler! I just figured out who you are!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Can you figure out what I'm doing?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You're Lewis Posin.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Who?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Lewis Posin! He was my best friend in fifth grade, and-and then one day I asked him to be my boyfriend and he said no. Do you know why?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Because you kept talking to him while he was trying to go to the bathroom?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No! But because he thought I was to faaaaa.... (Chandler emerges, without flushing by the way.) And every time I think about it, it makes me feel as bad as I did in fifth grade! Y'know, I-I really think that you should apologize to Julie.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What? Are you kidding? That was like 16 years ago.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, I know. But y'know what? It would make me feel better if Lewis apologized to me.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, I will do it. But I have to warn you; this may make me a better person and that is not the man you feel in love with!
Joey and Rachel's, Joey and Ross are laying out the ground rules for the maid of honor auditions to Rachel and Phoebe.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay, all right, this is how it's going to work. We're gonna give you hypothetical maid of honor situations and you will be scored on a scale of 1 to 10, 1 being the highest.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, 10 is the highest.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Why is 10 the highest?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Because it's the highest. (Joey shrugs his shoulders) Okay, Rachel you're up first. (Rachel stands up and gets ready.) Situation No. 1: You're with Monica, the wedding is about to start when Monica gets cold feet. Go! (Joey is playing the part of Monica.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (crying) I don't want to marry Chandler!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, uh...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I've got cold feet.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: ...it's gonna be okay!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, one man for the rest of my life? I don't know if I can do it! This means I'll never get to sleep with Joey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Look Monica, getting cold feet is very common. Y'know, it's-it's just because of all the anticipation and you just have to remember that you love Chandler. And also, I ran out on a wedding. You don't get to keep the gifts.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (out of his Monica character) Very good! Drawing on your own experience, I like that!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes, very nice Rachel.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Thank you judges.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ugh, what a kiss ass.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay, Phoebe...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yes! Your honor?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: We're now in the ceremony, Monica is about to say, "I do" when her drunk uncle starts yelling. What do you do? Go!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (playing the drunk uncle) When Monica was a little girl, I remember that-(Phoebe screams and tackles him)-Ooh!! Ow! Very good!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yes! Excellent! Perfect score!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wait a minute! She just made a scene in the middle of the ceremony!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey! Do you want do you want a little taste of Pheebs?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It is time for you to give your maid of honor speech.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh, wait a minute, we haven't pre...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Go!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay! Okay! Umm, Webster's Dictionary defines marriage as... (Ross and Joey start writing.) Okay!! Forget that! That sucks!! Okay, never mind! Forget it! Umm, umm, okay, uh... I met, I-I met, I met Monica when we were just a couple of six year olds and I became friends with Chandler when he was 25, although he seemed like a six year old.

lines.speaker: Ross and Joey
lines.text: Oh! That's nice.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Thank you. Thank you very much. Umm, I've known them separately and I've known them together and-and to know them as a couple is to know that you are truly in the presence of love. So I would like to raise my glass (Grabs a glass and holds it up) to Monica and Chandler and the beautiful adventure they are about to embark upon together. I can think of no two people better prepared for the journey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wow. (To Ross) Good speech.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, it really was!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Aw, thanks!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay Phoebe, I guess you're next (To Joey) although I really don't see the point.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, I can't believe that Monica and Chandler are getting married. I remember talking about this day with Rachel while we were showering together, naked. (Raises her glass and drinks.)
Joey and Ross pause while they picture the event.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: And she's back in the game.
A random apartment building, Chandler and Monica are knocking on the door of the woman from the beginning.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (she opens the door) Julie hi! Chandler Bing, I, I guess you remember me.

lines.speaker: Julie
lines.text: Hello Skidmark.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (To Monica) It's a nickname, I'll explain later.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It's pretty clear.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ah, uh, I owe you a long overdue apology. I never should have broken up with you because you were overweight.

lines.speaker: Julie
lines.text: That's why you broke up with me?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You-you-you didn't know that. (Pause as she nods no.) Well, I guess my work here is done!
Central Perk, Joey and Ross are giving Phoebe and Rachel the results of their election. Somewhat faster than Florida I might add.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, well first of all I would like to say that you both performed very well. Okay? You should be proud of yourselves. And-and I would also like to say that in this competition there are no losers. Well, except for Rachel-Damnit!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Really?! I won!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm sorry Rach, it was, it was really close.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well then I demand a recount! (Hmm, I wonder where I've heard that before.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Actually, it wasn't that close.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No! Y'know what? No! No! You thing was so stupid anyway, this was ridiculous-We're gonna flip a coin! (Phoebe gasps.) All right?! (She flips the coin.) Heads! (Looks at the coin and grunts in disgust.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: The coins have finally forgiven me!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well y'know what? I hope Monica forgives you after you throw her, her vegetarian, voodoo, goddess circley shower! (Runs out.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (running after her) Rach, it's gonna be okay! (To Ross and Joey) You guys are the best!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Boy I tell ya, that judging stuff took a lot out of me.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! I was thinking about maybe going upstairs and taking a little nap on my couch. (Raises his eyebrows, questioning Ross to see if he wants to join him.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Why-why would I care about that?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No reason, I'm just saying that uh... That's where I'll be.
Joey gets up and heads for the door. After a pause Ross decides to join him.
Monica, Chandler, and Phoebe's, Chandler and Monica have returned from Julie's.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: As bad as that went I actually enjoyed myself. I think that I'm going to apologize for all of the stupid things I do.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why don't you just stop doing stupid things? Then you wouldn't have to apologize.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I would really love it if could do both.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right, I...I have to ask.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Are you gonna break up with me if I get fat again?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, you broke up with Julie Grath! How much weight could she have gained?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: A hundred and forty-five pounds.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: In one year?! My God what did she eat? Her-her family! That's not the point.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Look I know it was a stupid reason to break up with somebody, but I was 15!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well... That's not the only time this was an issue. You remember when umm, you spent Thanksgiving with us? You called me fat.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay. Okay, now wait a minute that was totally different.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You were not supposed to hear that! I said that behind you back!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What if I have babies, okay? I mean I'm gonna look different. I'm okay with that, but I'm not sure that you are!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Look you have to realize I don't think of you as a thin, beautiful woman. (Monica glares at him.) See this is one of things that I can apologize for later! Look, what I mean is you're Monica! Okay? And I am in love with Monica.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Keep going.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So you can balloon up or you can shrink down and I will still love you.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Even if I shrink down to two inches tall?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'd carry you around in my pocket.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I love you. (They hug and kiss.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Skidmark's still got a way with the ladies.
Central Perk, Phoebe is there as Rachel enters carrying a shopping bag.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi Pheebs.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi! I just want to apologize. I'm really sorry I was a baby.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: That's ridiculous Rachel, we were all babies once. (Rachel looks at her.) Oh, you mean today.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah. Yeah, and y'know you-you deserve to win. And-and y'know I was thinking about it, if-if you're Monica's maid of honor that means I get to be yours.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh yeah!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah! Oh, umm when-when Monica and Chandler got engaged I started putting some stuff together, y'know just in case...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh that's so sweet thanks.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Here is a book of poetry that I know Monica loves. And-and ohh God this is funny, look, this is a picture of one Halloween where she dressed up as a bride. (Shows Phoebe the picture.) And look, she made me carry her train, which was weird because I was Wonder Woman. Oh and here's a little purse that I found. (Hands her the purse) Y'know I just thought that maybe they could hold the rings in there.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ohh.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: And umm, vintage handkerchiefs y'know 'cause, people cry at weddings. (Starting to cry.) I'm just gonna grab a couple of these.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: This stuff is great!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, I forgot this was in here. Umm, this was the uh garter that I was saving for my wedding and I wanted it to be Monica's something borrowed and it's blue. (Starts to cry again.) Yeah...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Y'know Rach, I think that, I think you should be Monica's made of honor.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You do? Why?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Because I think it means more to you.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: But Pheebs, y'know you earned it.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Its fine. I mean, this is something that you've been thinking about since you were what, 14? (She's referring to the Halloween picture.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, I was ten. I just developed early.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (looking at the picture again) Man alive!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (entering) Hey, what's going on?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, we just decided that Rachel is gonna be your maid of honor.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (gasps) Ohh, wow! That's great! (Rachel and Monica hug.) Oh wow! We really have to start planning! I have, I have a lot of really specific ideas! We should probably get together like four times per week. You can come over to my place; we'll get together before work! What do you say, 6:30, my place? I'm so excited! (Runs out leaving Rachel completely stunned and Phoebe laughing.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah okay, you laugh now, but she's gonna be yours. (Phoebe gets suddenly scared.)
Ending Credits
Joey and Rachel's, Joey and Ross are napping together again and both wake up at the same time.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Great nap.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It really was.
Suddenly Rachel clears her throat and the camera cuts to the rest of the gang staring at them. Needless to say Joey and Ross are shocked and slowly turn their heads to see the gang.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (reacting first by jumping up) Dude! What the hell are you doing?! God! (Heads for his room leaving Ross.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (slowly stands up and says quietly) Excuse me. (Exits.)
End
